description.ko: 우주의 가장 먼 곳에 대한 몰입형 탐험으로, VOID-3가 깊은 우주의 고요한 장엄함과 무지갯빛 그림자 사이를 항해합니다.
description.en: An immersive exploration of the furthest reaches of the universe, where the VOID-3 navigates through the silent majesty and iridescent shadows of the deep cosmos.

prompt: Cinematic 8k wide shot of the VOID-3 vessel drifting in the absolute center of a cosmic deep, surrounded by swirling dark matter, vibrant violet and indigo nebulae, distant pulsing quasars, minimalist spacecraft design with obsidian textures, hyper-detailed stellar dust, ethereal lighting, sense of infinite scale and silence.
